description_long: This is a high-top sneaker in a mustard yellow color, featuring a classic Converse All Star design. The upper is made of canvas material with visible stitching and reinforced eyelets for the laces. The toe cap is white rubber, providing durability and a signature look, while the sole is made of textured white rubber with a black stripe running along the edge. The lateral side displays a circular Converse All Star patch in brown, and the heel has a branded rubber patch. The shoe is equipped with standard criss-cross lacing and metal eyelets, and the interior appears padded for comfort. The overall appearance is clean and well-maintained, with no visible signs of wear.
description: A mustard yellow high-top Converse sneaker with a white rubber toe cap, black stripe, and classic All Star branding. The shoe features canvas material, criss-cross lacing, and a textured rubber sole.
description_view_0: Front view showing the white rubber toe cap, criss-cross lacing, and symmetrical eyelets.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the Converse All Star circular patch and the full length of the shoe.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the branded rubber heel patch and padded collar.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the plain canvas side and the shoe's overall silhouette.
attribute_logo: Circular Converse All Star patch on the lateral side in brown; rectangular Converse All Star patch on the heel in black and white.
